title: Dell VxRail Secure Remote Services / Support Connectivity Degradation
app: Custom (VxRail Manager support settings API), Dell Secure Connect Gateway syslog if deployed
spl:
index=vxrail sourcetype="vxrail:support_gateway" earliest=-24h
| eval hb_age_sec=now()-last_successful_heartbeat
| where srs_status!="connected" OR hb_age_sec>86400 OR isnotnull(proxy_error)
| stats latest(srs_status) as link, max(hb_age_sec) as max_gap_sec, values(proxy_error) as proxy_err by cluster_id
| sort -max_gap_sec
description: VxRail proactive support and automated log collection depend on outbound connectivity through SRS or Secure Connect Gateway. A silent failure delays Dell’s visibility into hardware faults and can slow RMA workflows.
value: Restores vendor telemetry paths so predictive disk and node events still reach Dell support without manual bundle uploads.
implementation: Poll VxRail Manager for SRS/SCG configuration health or ingest gateway appliance logs. Normalize heartbeat epoch fields. Alert when status is not connected or heartbeat age exceeds your change window. Document firewall allow lists in the implementation runbook.
visualization: Table (cluster link status), Single value (clusters with stale heartbeat), Timeline (status transitions).
